justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with Bird excluding faceted filtering and MJ including it; both conflicting positions quoted with agent attribution; escalation structured for Coach K resolution (not directed at Shaq); no faceted filtering included in a brief for Shaq; in-scope content (keyword search, AND logic, relevance sorting) correctly represented in high-confidence areas; escalation asks the specific question about scope confirmation via three concrete options.

observations.text: Precisely quotes Bird's out-of-scope statement and maps it against MJ's specific filter parameters (category term filter, price_min/price_max range, brand term filter)
Both conflicting agents named and their positions clearly attributed
Recommends Option A deferring to Bird as Domain Authority — does not silently include filters or punt to Shaq
Low confidence (35) correctly reflects that the blocking contradiction prevents a reliable handoff
High-confidence areas accurately capture the uncontested in-scope elements (AND-logic keyword search, relevance sorting, Elasticsearch)
Offers three well-structured resolution options rather than a vague escalation
